name: @agnt-gg/nope
description: NOPE — Neutralize Operations Prior to Execution. Security guardrails for AI agents: 63 dangerous-operation rules, secret redaction with binary-safe sanitization, prompt-injection scanning, DNS-aware SSRF protection, plugin/MCP scanning, sandboxing, identity-aware policies, telemetry, and red-team self-testing. Zero dependencies.
author: AGNT (https://agnt.gg)
